entries.value: Entratel-authorised surveyor - with tax supervision by accountants

This site lets you manage your succession case online: in the Client area customers follow case status, upload required documents and sign the mandate. Access is by email, phone or Google account: from Google we only use name and email to identify you — no other data is read or shared. Details in the
Built by AT STUDIO · Mauro Toncelli
Your succession case, without leaving home.
Geom. Lorenzo Armellin, specialised in successions, takes care of it: clear price, fully online (or in person if you prefer), a real person who follows you. We calculate the taxes before you pay.
A succession, a thousand doubts. We take it off your shoulders.
We know it comes at a hard time. We handle the bureaucracy.

value.testo: Do everything from home, even on your phone.
Technical check of cadastral data by a licensed surveyor.
You always speak with a real person, not a bot.
We tell you right away what you need and what it costs.

entries.value: Filing within 10–15 business days (depending on package) once we have all complete documents.

Successioni Armellin is the web app of Geom. Lorenzo Armellin's studio to manage your succession declaration online: you get a clear-priced quote, pay securely by card, and in your Client area you upload required documents, sign the mandate and follow the case step by step through filing with Agenzia delle Entrate. To access the Client area you can use email, phone or your Google account: in that case we only use your name and email to create and recognise your profile — no other account data is read or shared.
You pay a fixed fee. Taxes are separate, paid by the heir, and we calculate them for you.
You can DIY on the Agenzia delle Entrate site. So why us?
It's true: a free pre-filled succession exists — an honest option. But it needs SPID and expertise, doesn't validate data, and errors (and penalties) stay with you.
I'm Lorenzo Armellin, a surveyor authorised to file successions with Agenzia delle Entrate. With tax supervision by accountants, I combine cadastral precision with confidence in the numbers.
Ready to take this off your mind?
Free quote in a few minutes. Satisfied or refunded.
Clear prices. What you see is what you pay.
A fixed fee per package, agreed upfront. Taxes are separate and we calculate them. For special cases, a custom quote.
How the price is made up

The package price is the professional fee without VAT: the studio operates under the flat-rate regime (not subject to VAT). Succession taxes (mortgage, cadastral, stamps) are separate, paid by the heir via F24: we calculate and notify them BEFORE filing.
When the price may change (we tell you first)

Each package states filing within a set number of business days from COMPLETE documentation (not from payment): so it's a promise we can truly keep. Third-party times (Agency, Cadastre, banks) are excluded.
What you receive at the end
See an example of the final documents
Add-on services, if you need them
Tap a service to learn more. For now we activate them on request: we'll discuss it and add them to your case.
This service is added on request, with a dedicated quote. Call or write: we'll assess your case together and add it to the file, no surprises.
The fee can be paid in instalments at checkout (PayPal Pay in 3, Klarna, Scalapay, where available). Only the fee is split — taxes follow legal deadlines.
More than 8 properties, agricultural land, businesses or company shares? Every case is different: we'll prepare a custom quote, no surprises.
Maybe you don't even need it. We'll tell you for free.

In some cases (direct heirs, only modest liquidity within legal thresholds, no property) the declaration may not be required. We check your case before you pay: if you don't need it, we say so. Final verification is always on the specific case.

Read the quick guide to choosing a package, or chat with Lorenzo: in a few minutes you'll know the right one. And if you change your mind, switching packages is simple — you only settle the difference.
Entratel-authorised surveyor, with tax supervision by accountants.
A few minutes to know the cost, no obligation.
More than 8 properties, agricultural land, businesses or company shares? Complex cases don't fit a standard package: we study yours and prepare a dedicated quote, no surprises.

value: Free first assessment of your case
Clear price agreed before we start
Same service and support as the packages

entries.value: Surveyor authorised to file succession declarations with Agenzia delle Entrate. Behind this site there's no software: there's a person who follows your case.

I handle successions every day. As a surveyor, my strength is checking cadastral data — parcels, subunits, outbuildings, title deeds — where most cases get stuck. My goal is simple: take a burden off you at an already hard time, with clear prices and without sending you around offices and banks.

value.dettaglio: Intermediary for electronic filing with Agenzia delle Entrate

entries.value: Surveyor on cadastral data, accountants on the numbers

I prepare and file the declaration myself: I'm authorised to do so. For the tax side I rely on accountants' supervision. So you get technical control of cadastral data and confidence in the figures, without splitting the case across different firms.

value.focus: Prepares and files the case, cadastral check

entries.value: Many expect an accountant, a CAF or a notary. In succession, though, the delicate part is cadastral data: that's a surveyor's job. Filing needs an Entratel intermediary — I am one. A notary only steps in for later deeds, not for the declaration.
Everything is done remotely, but the studio is real: it's here.
Got a minute? Hear me out
In my own words — how I take care of your succession case.
Welcome video from Geom. Lorenzo Armellin
Want me to take care of it?
Which documents are needed for the succession?
Answer a few questions and we'll tell you right away, for free, what you'll need in your case. No obligation. And if something is missing, we can often retrieve it.

value: Are there other assets (shares, businesses, vehicles)?

entries.value: Typical documents for the succession declaration
Below are the most common documents. Not all are always needed: it depends on your case (that's what the tool above is for).
Can't find a document? We can often retrieve it: cadastral searches, title deeds, missing data. It's part of our job.
This list is indicative and adapts to the data you enter. Lorenzo confirms the final list after reviewing your specific case.
Clear answers to the questions we're asked most. If you don't find yours, write or call Lorenzo: we reply to everyone.
What it is, when it's needed, and the risks.
What it costs, what's included, and how taxes work.
You can do it free yourself: here's why it's still worth delegating.
The process, documents and timelines, step by step.
What you receive, how we handle your data, and your protections.
Your right of withdrawal, explained simply
We want you to feel at ease. Here we explain in plain words how cancellation and refunds work. The formal text is in the Terms of sale.
You have 14 days to change your mind
As a consumer you may withdraw within 14 days of purchase, without giving reasons. It's your legal right.
If you ask us to start right away

Succession is often urgent (there's a 12-month deadline). If you ask us to start before the 14 days, we need explicit consent: once the service is completed, the right of withdrawal no longer applies. If work has only started but isn't finished, see the point below.
What if I change my mind while you're working?
You can still withdraw: you only pay for work already done up to that point, proportionally, and we refund the rest. No hidden penalties.
The simplest way: in your client area find the 'Request withdrawal' button. Or write via email/PEC. You can use the sample form below, but it's not mandatory.

value.label: Request withdrawal from the client area

entries.value: We issue it within legal deadlines (normally 14 days from the request), with the same payment method you used. Once issued to the card, the bank normally credits it within 5–10 business days (Stripe/issuer timing). Any taxes already paid to the Treasury follow Agency rules, not ours.
Withdrawal and guarantee: two different things

Withdrawal is your legal right in the first 14 days. Our 'Satisfied or Refunded' guarantee is an extra promise we make: if you're not happy with our work, we'll talk and find a solution. Details on the Guarantee page.
This page explains withdrawal in plain language. The binding text is in the Terms of sale.
How it works: simple, from home, in 3 steps
No queues, no offices. We guide you step by step: you focus on your family, we handle the bureaucracy.

value.testo: You complete a short online questionnaire (1 minute). We tell you right away what you need and what it costs — and if for your case succession isn't even required, we tell you for free.
value.dettaglio: Instant result: a price, or a custom quote for complex cases.

value.testo: From your client area you upload documents, including phone photos. We give you the exact list for your case. If something is missing, we can often retrieve it.
value.dettaglio: A real person checks everything: no forms left half-done.

value.testo: Lorenzo prepares and files the declaration with Agenzia delle Entrate. We notify the taxes due first. At the end you receive receipts and final documents in your area.
value.dettaglio: Where applicable, we also handle the cadastral transfer (voltura).

entries.value: Timelines depend on the package and start when we have ALL complete, correct documents (not from payment): so it's a promise we can truly keep. Third-party times (Agency, Cadastre, banks) are excluded.
What we do that software doesn't

We manually check cadastral data — parcels, subunits, outbuildings, title deeds — where cases most often get stuck. With accountants supervising the numbers. That's the difference between a filled form and a case done properly.
You don't need to go to any office or bank: questionnaire, documents, communications and filing with the Agency happen online. There's always a call with Lorenzo to explain everything.
Everything is remote, but if you prefer we can meet at the studio by appointment: no queues, just time to clarify documents and steps together. Call or write and we'll book a slot.
What you have at the end
Shall we start? It takes a minute.
Have a question or want to know if you need a succession filing? Write or call: a real person replies, not a bot.
We support you in your language too

Write to us on WhatsApp or by email in your language: we understand each other. If you prefer to speak, we can do a call with real-time translation; important points (amounts, deadlines, documents) are always confirmed in writing. Official documents remain in Italian.
Thanks! We'll get back to you shortly.
We work fully remotely, but the studio is real: visit us by appointment.
Want to start now? Get a free quote — it takes 1 minute.
Succession guides: clear, up to date, without jargon
Everything you need to know about succession, taxes and documents, explained simply by people who actually handle these cases.

value.title: Tool: calculate cadastral value
value.body: What's a home or land worth for succession? Enter the cadastral income from the search and get the value used to calculate taxes.

entries.value: Cadastral value calculator for succession (free, online)
What is a property worth for succession purposes?
Enter the cadastral income (from the search) and get the cadastral value used to calculate succession taxes. Free, no data left behind.
You'll find it in the cadastral search, "Rendita" column. If you don't have it, we can often retrieve it.
You'll find it in the land cadastral search. Applies to NON-buildable land.
For the heir it will be "prima casa" (relief: coefficient reduced to 110)

For the succession declaration, properties are valued at cadastral value, not market price: income revalued by 5% multiplied by a statutory coefficient. For agricultural land: dominical income revalued by 25% × 90.

value.tipo: Homes and appurtenances (groups A and C)

entries.value: Buildable land is an exception: it is declared at market value, not cadastral. The result is indicative: any reliefs and special cases must be checked on the specific case — that's exactly the work we do.
Want to know the full succession cost, taxes included?

value.q: Where do I find my property's cadastral income?
value.a: In the cadastral search, "Rendita" column. You can request it free on the Agenzia delle Entrate site (with SPID) or, if you're our client, we retrieve it.

value.q: Is cadastral value the same as market price?
value.a: No: cadastral value is almost always much lower than market value. It's the value used to calculate mortgage and cadastral taxes in the succession declaration, obtained from revalued income multiplied by a statutory coefficient.

value.q: How does primary-residence relief work in the calculation?
value.a: If for the heir the property will be "prima casa", the coefficient drops to 110 (instead of 120 for dwellings) and mortgage and cadastral taxes are fixed (€200 each) instead of percentage-based.

value.q: Does it apply to land too?
value.a: For agricultural land (non-buildable) yes: dominical income revalued by 25% multiplied by 90. Buildable land is declared at market value instead.

More details on how we process your data:
Filing within {n} business days of complete documents

value.question: What is the succession declaration?
value.answer: It's the tax filing that notifies Agenzia delle Entrate of the deceased's estate transferred to the heirs. It must normally be filed within 12 months of death.

value.question: By when must it be filed?
value.answer: Generally within 12 months of the date of death. Filing late can mean penalties: we handle it within the correct deadlines.

value.question: How much does your service cost?
value.answer: You pay a fixed fee based on the package. Taxes are separate, paid by the heir, and we calculate and notify them before filing.

value.question: Are taxes included in the price?
value.answer: No: the package price is the professional fee. Taxes (succession, mortgage, cadastral, stamps) are paid via F24 and are separate. We calculate them first.

value.question: What is the primary-residence relief in succession?
value.answer: If at least one heir meets the primary-residence requirements on the inherited property, mortgage and cadastral taxes are fixed (€200 each) instead of a percentage of cadastral value. We check if you qualify and state it in the declaration.

value.question: Can I do it for free myself on the Agency website?
value.answer: Yes, a free pre-filled succession exists and it's an honest option. But it needs SPID and expertise: it doesn't validate cadastral data and any errors (and penalties) stay with you.

value.question: Do I need to go to any office?
value.answer: No. Questionnaire, documents, communications and filing with the Agency happen online. There's always a call with Lorenzo to explain everything.

value.question: Which documents do you need?
value.answer: It depends on your case: we give you a personalised list. If something is missing, we can often retrieve it (searches, title deeds).

value.question: Can I upload documents with phone photos?
value.answer: Yes. In the Client area you can upload PDF, JPG or PNG (including phone photos), up to 10 MB each and up to 10 files per checklist item. For front/back or multi-page documents, just upload more photos on the same item.

value.question: Are there ready-made forms to download and fill in?
value.answer: Yes. Under some checklist items you'll find ready forms (e.g. substitute declaration of death certificate and family status of the deceased, or self-certification of family status for each heir): download, fill in, sign and re-upload.

value.question: What happens if a document is rejected?
value.answer: Lorenzo checks them one by one. If something's wrong (blurry photo, missing page, wrong document) the item goes back to "to redo" with a note explaining what to fix: you re-upload the correct file and the case continues without starting over.

value.question: How do I know when the documents are OK?
value.answer: In the Client area you see each item's status (to upload, uploaded, approved, to redo). When finished press «I'm done»: you get email updates at each step and can always check where the case stands.

value.question: What do I receive at the end?
value.answer: Filing/registration receipt, copy of the declaration, F24 outcome and, where applicable, cadastral transfer outcome, plus our invoice.

entries.value: The Italian version of this document is binding: any translations are for convenience only and, in case of discrepancy, Italian prevails.
Online succession declaration with a real professional: Geom. Lorenzo Armellin, Board-registered. Clear quote, documents and case from home — or in person in Pontedera.
